And I am sadly talking about Olivia Rodrigo. 😬 I truly deeply hope that her parents are steering her away from his direction because if my suspicions are correct it is absolutely predatory. Maybe OR believes she can fix Jack White like all very immature, childlike/technical adults. He should really hang his head in shame for this latest sordid chapter. It’s giving predator, Jack. It’s fine for you to divorce. This woman that you clearly never wanted to marry to begin with. But, leave the 23 year old kid alone. Grow up. Try.
